text:
an face
and an equestrian body. He holds a long bow and staying in a
hermitage guards the ascetics and their sacrificial articles. As
this decanate belongs to the same Sign it is significant that the
description accords well with that of Sagittarius itself. Jupiter
being a spiritual planet is in charge of penance and sacrifice.
This is good also for warriors and race-fans. The second is a
charming lady with a golden complexion and moderate height.
She is seated on a throne and is separating the gems of the sea.
According to the other it is a man learned in the Sastras, a clever
expounder of the scriptures and performer of many sacrifices.
He goes constantly to sacred places. The last is a man with a
beard and golden complexion, seated on a worthy chair holding
a rod. He is clad in silks and skins. The first decanate of
Capricorn is a man full of hairs with the body like that of hog
and a fieree look. He holds in his hands a rope, a net and a
trap.
